/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/snake.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/snake.dir/src/menu.c.o CMakeFiles/snake.dir/src/game.c.o -o snake  /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk/usr/lib/libcurses.tbd /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk/usr/lib/libform.tbd
